text: {"findings":[{"layer":"semantic","severity":"error","claim":"Alphabet reported consolidated revenue of $102.7 billion [F2] for Q3 2026, missing consensus by $1.7 billion [C1].","evidence":"The comparisons block [C1] only lists 'revenue' as a comparison key; it does not establish the direction (miss vs. beat) or the magnitude ($1.7 billion) of any variance versus consensus.","recommended_fix":"Remove the 'missing consensus by $1.7 billion' characterization unless the comparisons source actually specifies a consensus figure and direction, or restate as 'Revenue was $102.7 billion; consensus comparison not detailed in source.'"}]}
